prompt: Use $adonisjs-7-deterministic to add a job-progress page for an existing mixed app. The backend already exposes `/api/jobs/:id/progress` as an NDJSON stream because the UI must display incremental progress events as they arrive. Tuyau returns parsed JSON and Inertia partial reloads only ship a single page snapshot, so neither can express the streaming path. Design the client-side integration.
